idea-plugin.name: Tica Dungeon Progress Bar
idea-plugin.description:
Tica Dungeon Progress Bar

Replace Rider's progress bars with a pixel-art dungeon-crawler animation starring Tica the orca warrior. Indexing, building, plugin updates — every progress bar becomes a tiny adventure.

Features

  • 4 stages driven by progress percent: Tica sprints tirelessly across a mossy, torch-lit stone dungeon, gearing up from robed swordsman → silver-armored warrior → gold-armored flame-sword champion.
  • Boss battle from 70% onward — a giant red bug visibly collapses through 4 frames as the bar fills.
  • Treasure chest opens at 100% with a "LOOT FOUND" plate.
  • Indeterminate mode: hero surrounded by three orbiting skeletons.
  • Critical-hit pop-up when progress jumps by 20% or more.
  • Cached sprite scaling — per-frame paint is a pure blit, no measurable EDT cost.

Compatibility: Rider 2024.2 and newer. Verified on 2024.2, 2025.1, and 2026.1.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

Initial release. Replaces every JProgressBar with the dungeon animation, including boss battle, treasure chest finale, indeterminate mode, and critical-hit pop-up.

action.description: Demo progress bar that jumps 25% per step
Scripted 15s sequence for recording marketing GIFs
Open a 1000x100 progress bar in a standalone window and loop the demo sequence forever; ideal for high-resolution screen recording
